children.name: InfoFlow Public People Search In Chilean
children.description: Chilean public records lookup service for vehicle registrations, personal ID numbers (RUN), company information, and reverse name-to-RUN lookups via web portal, WhatsApp, or Telegram.
children.bestFor: Chilean public records and identity verification
children.input: Name, RUN (Chilean ID number), or vehicle plate
children.output: Personal identification data, vehicle registration, company records
children.opsecNote: Requires registration with Chilean RUT; queries may be logged.

children.name: ThatsThem
children.description: Free people search engine with 2.2 billion indexed names. Provides reverse phone, email, address, and IP lookups alongside standard name searches.
children.bestFor: Quick free people lookups by name, address, phone, email, or IP
children.input: Name, address, phone number, email, or IP address
children.output: Contact details, associated addresses, phone numbers, email addresses
children.opsecNote: Free tier has daily lookup limits; no account required for basic searches.

children.name: Melissa Data - People Finder (R)
children.description: Enterprise data quality and identity verification platform offering people search, address verification, phone append, and email verification across global datasets.
children.bestFor: Enterprise-grade identity verification and data enrichment
children.output: Verified contact data, address standardization, identity confirmation
children.opsecNote: Enterprise service; queries logged and usage tracked under account.

children.name: PeekYou
children.description: Free people search engine indexing over 300 million profiles. Aggregates social media accounts, public records, and web presence into unified profiles.
children.bestFor: Finding social media profiles and web presence by name
children.input: Name and optional location, or username
children.output: Aggregated social media profiles, contact information, web presence
children.opsecNote: No registration required; all searches use public data.

children.name: Webmii
children.description: Free people search engine that calculates a web visibility score based on online presence across social networks, news, and web pages.
children.bestFor: Assessing online visibility and web footprint
children.output: Web visibility score, social profiles, images, videos, news mentions
children.opsecNote: No registration required; searches public web data only.

children.name: Snitch.name
children.description: People profile search engine checking approximately 40 social networks including Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Xing, and government databases.
children.bestFor: Cross-platform social media profile discovery
children.output: Social media profiles across ~40 platforms
children.opsecNote: SSL certificate expired; browsers will show security warnings.

children.name: Lullar
children.description: Free people search tool that checks 148+ social media platforms for matching profiles by email or username. No sign-up or payment required.
children.bestFor: Username and email-based social media profile enumeration
children.output: Matching profiles across 148+ social media platforms
children.opsecNote: No registration required; searches public profiles only.

children.name: Yasni
children.description: Free people search engine allowing searches by name, location, profession, company, or skills. Also offers professional Expose profile pages.
children.bestFor: Name-based people search with professional context
children.input: Name, location, profession, company, or skills
children.output: Aggregated web presence, professional profiles, contact information
children.opsecNote: No registration for searches; account needed for profile creation features.

children.name: findmypast.com
children.description: UK-focused genealogy and historical records platform with billions of records covering census, birth, marriage, death, military, and immigration documents.
children.bestFor: UK and Irish genealogy and historical records research
children.input: Name, date of birth, location, or family details
children.output: Historical records, census data, BMD certificates, military records
children.opsecNote: Subscription required for full record access; free trial available.

children.name: IDCrawl
children.description: Free people search aggregator that finds social media profiles, photos, and public records across major platforms including Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
children.bestFor: Aggregated people search across social media and public records
children.output: Social media profiles, photos, public records, contact information
children.opsecNote: Cloudflare-protected; no registration required.

children.name: FamilySearch.org
children.description: Free genealogy platform operated by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints with billions of historical records, family trees, and digitized documents worldwide.
children.bestFor: Free genealogy research and historical record access
children.input: Name, date, place, or family relationships
children.output: Historical records, family trees, digitized documents, cemetery records
children.opsecNote: Basic search is free without login; account needed for Family Tree features.

children.name: Ancestry.com
children.description: World's largest genealogy platform with over 40 billion historical records including census, immigration, military, and vital records across 80+ countries.
children.bestFor: Comprehensive genealogy and family history research
children.input: Name, date of birth, location, or family details
children.output: Historical records, DNA matches, family trees, immigration records
children.opsecNote: Free basic search; subscription required for full record access and DNA features.

children.name: AnyWho
children.description: Free white pages directory providing people search by name, reverse phone lookup, and address lookup for US-based contacts.
children.bestFor: US white pages people and phone lookups
children.output: Contact details, address, phone numbers, associated people
children.opsecNote: Free service; may have bot protection on automated access.

children.name: Addresses.com
children.description: Free people search engine for name, phone, and address lookups. Basic results are free; detailed reports redirect to Intelius (paid).
children.bestFor: Quick US people and address lookups
children.output: Name, age, partial phone numbers, associated addresses
children.opsecNote: Free basic searches; detailed reports require Intelius subscription.

children.name: FaceCheckID
children.description: Reverse image face search engine that matches uploaded photos against social media, news, and mugshot databases to identify individuals.
children.bestFor: Reverse face image search and identity verification
children.output: Matching profiles, social media accounts, news articles, mugshots
children.opsecNote: Uploaded images are processed server-side; free tier has limited results, credits required for full access.

children.name: usa-people-search.com
children.description: US people search and background check service accessing public records. Reports are paid with significant consumer complaints about billing.
children.bestFor: US background checks and people search via public records
children.output: Background reports, contact details, public records
children.opsecNote: Paid service ($39.95 per report); bot protection active; low trust ratings

children.name: The Knot
children.description: Wedding registry search allowing lookup of couples' wedding registries by name. Part of The Knot comprehensive wedding planning platform.
children.bestFor: Finding wedding registries by couple name
children.output: Wedding registry links and gift lists
children.opsecNote: Public search; no registration required.

children.name: Registry Finder
children.description: Gift registry search aggregator searching across partner retailers including Amazon, Target, and Zola for wedding, baby, birthday, and other registries.
children.bestFor: Cross-retailer gift registry search
children.output: Registry links across multiple retailers
children.opsecNote: No registration required; revenue from affiliate commissions.

children.name: My Registry
children.description: Universal gift registry platform allowing users to add gifts from any store worldwide into one shareable registry for weddings, babies, and other occasions.
children.bestFor: Universal cross-store gift registry creation and search
children.output: Unified gift registry with items from multiple stores
children.opsecNote: Free registry search; account needed to create registries.

children.name: Amazon Registry Search
children.description: Amazon gift registry search for wedding, baby, and other registries.
children.bestFor: Finding Amazon gift registries by name
children.output: Amazon gift registry links and wish lists
children.opsecNote: Amazon account may be required for full access.

children.name: The Bump
children.description: Baby registry finder from The Bump parenting platform. Search for baby registries by name to find gift lists.
children.bestFor: Finding baby registries by parent name
children.output: Baby registry links and gift lists
children.opsecNote: No registration required to search registries.

children.name: Slydial
children.description: Voicemail drop service that connects directly to a recipient voicemail box without ringing the handset.
children.bestFor: Voicemail-based phone-number engagement checks
children.output: Voicemail delivery result and call/session outcome
children.opsecNote: Initiates outbound telephony actions against the target number and can generate logs/alerts.

children.name: Numbering Plans
children.description: International numbering reference for E.164 plans, carrier codes, and dialing metadata.
children.bestFor: Telephony standards and numbering-plan validation
children.input: Country code, number range, or prefix
children.output: Numbering-plan structure, carrier/routing metadata, and dialing references
children.opsecNote: Reference lookup against published numbering data; no interaction with the target number.

children.name: Numberway
children.description: Reverse phone lookup resource used to resolve ownership and location context from a phone number.
children.bestFor: Reverse phone owner and location enrichment
children.output: Potential owner identity, carrier, and geographic details
children.opsecNote: Query is brokered through third-party lookup infrastructure rather than direct target contact.

children.name: WhoCalld
children.description: Legacy reverse-caller-ID listing retained for historical continuity in this category.
children.bestFor: Historical reference only (defunct per project guidance)
children.output: Previously provided caller identity and spam context
children.opsecNote: Marked defunct per CEO guidance; reliability and operational behavior are not trusted.

children.name: CallerID Test
children.description: Caller ID and number-validation utility for checking formatting and telecom metadata responses.
children.bestFor: Caller-ID behavior and number validity testing
children.output: Validation status, format checks, and associated number metadata
children.opsecNote: Validation-style lookup with no direct contact to the target subscriber.

children.name: Twilio Lookup
children.description: Twilio API endpoint for phone intelligence including line type, carrier, and validation data.
children.bestFor: Programmatic carrier/type validation and fraud controls
children.output: Carrier, line type, validity, and optional risk/intelligence attributes
children.opsecNote: API calls are authenticated and logged by the provider account and may be auditable.

children.name: Fone Finder
children.description: Legacy reverse phone lookup entry preserved for historical coverage in the framework.
children.bestFor: Historical reference only (defunct per project guidance)
children.output: Previously provided owner/location lookup details
children.opsecNote: Marked defunct per CEO guidance; do not rely on this entry operationally.

children.name: True Caller
children.description: Caller identification platform and mobile app for reverse lookup and spam-call context.
children.bestFor: Caller-ID enrichment and spam reputation checks
children.output: Caller profile signals, spam labels, and identity hints
children.opsecNote: Lookups are mediated by the platform; typical usage does not directly notify the target.

children.name: Reverse Genie
children.description: Reverse phone lookup service that returns publicly aggregated ownership and location hints.
children.bestFor: Quick reverse-number triage from public-data aggregations
children.output: Possible owner name, location, and related listing details
children.opsecNote: Search is executed through an aggregator site and is generally non-interactive for targets.

children.name: SpyDialer
children.description: Reverse phone lookup platform with caller intelligence and voicemail-related lookup features.
children.bestFor: Phone-number attribution and spam context pivoting
children.output: Identity clues, carrier/location context, and related lookup data
children.opsecNote: Primary lookup behavior is database-driven, though some features may increase visibility.

children.name: Phone Validator
children.description: Number-validation utility focused on format, line-type, and carrier checks.
children.bestFor: Phone format/type validation before deeper pivots
children.output: Validity result, number type, and carrier/format metadata
children.opsecNote: Validation query against provider datasets with no direct target interaction.

children.name: Phonerator
children.description: Phone number generation and testing utility for telephony research workflows.
children.bestFor: Generating test-number patterns for scripting and analysis
children.output: Generated phone-number candidates and pattern outputs
children.opsecNote: Local generation/reference behavior; does not query target subscribers directly.

children.name: Mr. Number (M)
children.description: Mr. Number functionality has been consolidated under Hiya; retained as a legacy reference entry.
children.bestFor: Historical mapping to Hiya for caller-ID workflows
children.output: Previously returned spam and caller-ID context (now via Hiya platform)
children.opsecNote: Standalone service is deprecated; use the Hiya entry for current functionality.

children.name: Next Caller (R)
children.description: Caller-identification and spam intelligence service for reverse lookup workflows.
children.bestFor: Commercial caller-ID enrichment and number intelligence
children.output: Caller identity indicators, spam reputation, and associated context
children.opsecNote: Account-based commercial lookups are provider-logged and attributable to operator credentials.

children.name: Data24-7 (R)
children.description: Commercial data enrichment provider supporting phone-based identity and risk intelligence lookups.
children.bestFor: Enterprise-scale person/contact enrichment from phone pivots
children.output: Enriched identity, risk, and contact-profile datasets
children.opsecNote: B2B account activity is logged and tied to customer credentials and usage plans.

children.name: HLR Lookup Portal (R)
children.description: HLR lookup service for telecom reachability, network, and carrier status checks.
children.bestFor: Mobile carrier/HLR validation and route intelligence
children.output: HLR status, carrier/network identifiers, and routing metadata
children.opsecNote: Telecom lookup transactions are provider-recorded and typically require business credentials.

children.name: OpenCNAM API
children.description: CNAM lookup API for resolving caller-name metadata from North American numbers.
children.bestFor: Programmatic caller-name enrichment in telecom workflows
children.output: CNAM/caller-name string with associated lookup metadata
children.opsecNote: Authenticated API usage is logged and billable per account or subscription terms.

children.name: Numspy (T)
children.description: OSINT-focused phone lookup utility with CLI-friendly workflows and metadata extraction features.
children.bestFor: Technical lookup workflows and scripted number reconnaissance
children.output: Carrier/region and related phone intelligence fields
children.opsecNote: Tool-driven queries can be attributable to operator infrastructure and API endpoints.

children.name: Numspy-Api
children.description: API wrapper for Numspy-style phone intelligence queries and automation use cases.
children.bestFor: Programmatic phone-number verification and enrichment
children.output: Structured verification and metadata response payloads
children.opsecNote: Remote API calls are logged by service operators and linked to originating access patterns.

children.name: Family Tree Now (M)
children.description: People-search aggregator that can pivot from phone numbers to identity and relationship records.
children.bestFor: Phone-to-person and household/relative pivoting
children.output: Possible person records, addresses, and relationship links
children.opsecNote: Search is platform-mediated and generally does not involve direct interaction with targets.

children.name: Whitepages Reverse Phone
children.description: Reverse phone lookup product from Whitepages for US-focused identity and contact attribution.
children.bestFor: US reverse-phone attribution and address correlation
children.output: Potential owner, location history, and related contact records
children.opsecNote: Lookup occurs through a commercial data broker interface without direct target contact.

children.name: Hiya (R$)
children.description: Caller-ID and spam-protection platform with reverse lookup capabilities and mobile integrations.
children.bestFor: Spam classification and caller-ID enrichment on mobile workflows
children.output: Caller identity signals, spam ratings, and reputation context
children.opsecNote: Most checks are service-mediated; advanced features may still be account-tracked.
